def negative_public_iterator_yields_heterogeneous_item_shapes():
    rule_id = "public_iterator_yields_heterogeneous_item_shapes"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag iterators that yield different shapes or types without an explicit sum-type contract."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
